title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: 確認結果です。`delivery` 配下は「比較可能な2系統」はありますが、nanobanana 側は最終成果物未完です。 - 変種選択は未確定。`READY_FOR_SELECTION` かつ `selected_variant: null`。根拠: [variant-matrix.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variant-matrix.json) - `structured-native` は開いて比較可能（PPTX/PDF/JPGプレビュー28枚）。根拠: [output.pptx](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/structured-native/output.pptx), [output.pdf](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/structured-native/output.pdf), [preview-attempt-0](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/structured-native/preview-attempt-0), [delivery-gate.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/structured-native/delivery-gate.json) - `nanobanana-manus` はHTMLプレビュー28枚と生manifestは開ける。根拠: [preview-html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/preview-html), [slide_1.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/preview-html/slide_1.html), [raw-manus/Googleの医療AI利用はどこまで可能か](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/raw-manus/Googleの医療AI利用はどこまで可能か) - 未足りない点: `nanobanana-manus` の編集可能成果物（PPTX/PDF）が欠落（`outputPptx/outputPdf: null`, `editable: false`）。根拠: [variant-matrix.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variant-matrix.json), [nanobanana delivery-gate.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json) - 品質ゲート上は両方 `PASS/PREVIEW_ONLY` で blocking issue なし。ただし nanobanana は「preview-only」警告あり。根拠: [structured inspection-report.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/structured-native/inspection-report.json), [nanobanana inspection-report.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/inspection-report.json)
